title: Lava from Blazes│來自烈焰人的岩漿
description: You can get lava from Blazes.│你可以從烈焰人身上獲取岩漿。
body:
**⚠️ This data pack requires the server-side mod [Item Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components).│該資料包需要伺服器端模組[物品組件](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components)。 ⚠️**
# Function│功能
Use a bucket on a blaze to get a lava bucket, just like milking a cow, except you get a lava bucket instead.│對烈焰人使用鐵桶即可獲得熔岩桶，就像擠奶一樣，只是得到的是熔岩桶。
